name: precompact-router
description: Holographic fleet-level PreCompact router. One entry in settings.json dispatches to the correct agent's hook via a distributed fungal registry. Each body gets its own precompact-router.py + agent-registry.json; the same script at every level reads its local registry and routes to sub-routers or leaf hooks. Fleet router only knows about top-level bodies; each body's router knows its own children.
notes: Fungal distribution pattern: routing intelligence lives at every level, not concentrated at the head.
